zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas於大約1370年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯時，他的父親Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell46歲，母親Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas40歲。他於1390年與Lady Margaret Stewart在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1402年登記服兵役。他去世於1424年8月17日在法國諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年55歲，埋葬在法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas于大约1370年出生在苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯时，他的父亲Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell46岁，母亲Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas40岁。他于1390年与Lady Margaret Stewart在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1402年登记服兵役。他去世于1424年8月17日在法国諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年55岁，埋葬在法国崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas was born about 1370, in Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, was 46 and his mother, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, was 40. He married Lady Margaret Stewart in 1390, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1402. He died on 17 August 1424, in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas est né environ 1370, à Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Stewart en 1390, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1402. Il est décédé le 17 août 1424, à Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas um 1370 in Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell 46 und seine Mutter Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas 40. Er hat 1390 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Lady Margaret Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1402 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. August 1424 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas è nato il circa 1370 nel Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Stewart nel 1390, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1402. Morì il 17 agosto 1424, nel Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglasが約1370年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズ ホーウゼで生まれた時，父Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwellは46歳，母Joanna Moray Countess of Douglasは40歳であった。1390年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでLady Margaret Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年に兵役登録をした。彼は1424年8月17日にフランスノーマンディエウアバーネウイル-スル-アvアで55歳で死去し，フランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアートウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Battle of Verneuil, Maine-et-Loire, Pays: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas(이)가 대략 1370년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1390년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Lady Margaret Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1424년 8월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른우이-수-아브르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 토우르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Stewart em 1390, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1402. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1424, em Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França.

ru.Battle of Verneuil, Maine-et-Loire, Pays: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas родился около 1370 г. в местности кавирс хоус, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Stewart в 1390 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1402 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 августа 1424 г. в местности вирнеуил-сур-авр, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности тоурс, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas nació aproximadamente 1370, en Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Stewart en 1390, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1402. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1424, en Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.
